title: cichorium intybus f. sylvestre
intro: Cichorium intybus f. sylvestre, also known as wild endive or scurvy grass, is a variety of the chicory plant (Cichorium intybus) that grows in the wild. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and reduce blood sugar levels. The health benefits of consuming Cichorium intybus f. sylvestre include improving eye health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
